info.title: Microsoft.OData.Cli
info.description: The odata-cli is a CLI tool for generating strongly typed C# and Visual Basic client code for a specified OData service. It generates a DataServiceContext class to interact with the service and CLR types for each entity type and complex type in the service model. It does exactly what the OData Connected Service does.

commands.name: generate
commands.description: Command to generate proxy classes for OData endpoints.
